description.value: Price 24,000 gp; Slot headband; CL 8th; Weight 1 lb.; Aura moderate transmutation DESCRIPTION The wearer of efreeti horns gains a +4 enhancement bonus to Wisdom. In addition, the wearer can spend 1 ki point as a full-round action to gain the effects of enlarge person (self only) or reduce person (self only) for 1 minute. These effects apply to the wearer regardless of her actual creature type. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 12,000 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells enlarge person, owl’s wisdom, reduce person
